## Description
Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Feature addition
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist
- [ ] I have run the scanner against the included test cases
- [ ] New rules include test cases that demonstrate true and false positives
- [ ] Documentation is updated (README, SKILL.md, or docs/)
- [ ] Attribution is added for any third-party code or data

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue)
